name: Salade De Pois Chinche (Chick Pea Salad)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Nicoise or other small brine-cured black olives, pitted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, let the chick-peas soak in water to cover at room temperature for at least 8 hours or overnight.
2. Drain and rinse the chick-peas well.
3. In a large saucepan, bring 8 cups of water to a boil with the chick-peas. Simmer them, covered, for 1 hour.
4. Add salt and simmer the chick-peas for an additional 15 minutes, or until tender. Drain well.
5. The chick-peas may be prepared up to 1 day in advance and kept covered and chilled.
6. In a bowl of ice water, let the onion soak for 10 minutes. Drain well and pat dry.
7. In a large bowl, combine the chick-peas, onion, tomato, olives, bell pepper, and parsley.
8. In a small bowl, whisk together oregano, tarragon, basil, lemon juice, vinegar, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to taste.
9. Pour the dressing over the chick-pea mixture and toss gently but thoroughly.
10. Serves 6 to 8.
